questions.title: ABCDE Assessment Priority
questions.question_text: A 75-year-old patient arrives in AMU with chest pain and shortness of breath. Their observations are: RR 28, SpO2 88% on air, HR 110, BP 95/60, Temp 37.8°C, AVPU=A. What is your immediate priority in the ABCDE assessment?
expected_points: Breathing is the immediate priority due to low SpO2 (88%)
High respiratory rate (28) indicates respiratory distress
Oxygen therapy should be administered immediately

questions.title: NEWS2 Score Calculation
questions.question_text: Calculate the NEWS2 score for a patient with: RR 22, SpO2 94% on air, Temp 38.2°C, BP 110/70, HR 95, AVPU=A, no oxygen required.
expected_points: BP, HR, AVPU, oxygen = 0 points each

questions.title: Sepsis 6 Implementation
questions.question_text: A patient with suspected sepsis has a NEWS2 score of 6. List the six components of the Sepsis 6 bundle that should be completed within 1 hour.
expected_points: 4. Give IV fluid bolus if hypotensive

questions.title: Medication Calculation - IV Fluids
questions.question_text: A 70kg patient requires 30ml/kg/day maintenance fluids. Calculate the hourly infusion rate in ml/hour.

questions.title: Delirium Assessment
questions.question_text: An 82-year-old patient in AMU appears confused and agitated. What is the most appropriate initial assessment tool for delirium?
expected_points: 4AT is the recommended screening tool for delirium in acute settings
Assesses alertness, attention, acute change, and activity
High sensitivity and specificity for delirium

questions.title: Oxygen Therapy Targets
questions.question_text: What are the target SpO2 ranges for oxygen therapy in patients with COPD versus those without COPD?
expected_points: Monitor for signs of oxygen toxicity

questions.title: Falls Risk Assessment
questions.question_text: A 78-year-old patient with dementia and mobility issues is admitted to AMU. List five key interventions to reduce falls risk.
expected_points: 2. Call bell within reach, bed low and brakes on

questions.title: Infection Control - Hand Hygiene
questions.question_text: When should hand hygiene be performed during patient care? List the five moments for hand hygiene.

questions.title: Pain Assessment
questions.question_text: A patient with chest pain rates their pain as 8/10 on a numerical scale. What additional information should you gather during pain assessment?
expected_points: Impact on activities of daily living

questions.title: Medication Safety - The Five Rights
questions.question_text: Before administering any medication, what are the five rights that must be checked?

questions.title: ECG Interpretation - Basic
questions.question_text: A patient's ECG shows a regular rhythm at 120 bpm with narrow QRS complexes. What is the most likely rhythm?
expected_points: Regular rhythm with narrow QRS indicates supraventricular origin
Rate of 120 bpm is above normal sinus rhythm
Sinus tachycardia is common in acute illness

questions.title: Fluid Balance Monitoring
questions.question_text: A patient has been prescribed 1000ml IV fluids over 8 hours. The infusion started at 10:00. At 14:00, how much fluid should have been infused?

questions.title: Pressure Area Care
questions.question_text: A bedbound patient in AMU is at risk of pressure ulcers. What are the key interventions for pressure area care?

questions.title: SBAR Communication
questions.question_text: You need to escalate a deteriorating patient to the medical team. Describe how you would structure your SBAR communication.
expected_points: Situation: Who you are, what patient, what the problem is
Background: Relevant history, observations, current treatment
Assessment: What you think the problem is
Recommendation: What you want to happen next

questions.title: Medication Calculation - Antibiotics
questions.question_text: A patient is prescribed 1.2g of co-amoxiclav IV. The vial contains 1.2g in 20ml. How many ml should be drawn up?
expected_points: Check expiry date and reconstitution instructions

questions.title: End of Life Care
questions.question_text: A patient in AMU is approaching end of life. What are the key principles of end of life care?

questions.title: Documentation Standards
questions.question_text: What are the key principles of good nursing documentation?
expected_points: Reflects nursing assessment and care provided

questions.title: Discharge Planning
questions.question_text: A patient is ready for discharge from AMU. What key elements should be included in discharge planning?
